channel_news.title: A group of seven-figure Amazon sellers is planning a one-day ad boycott as payment changes squeeze cash flow
channel_news.summary: Some sellers are calling for a one-day boycott of the company’s advertising platform next week, urging merchants to turn off their ads on April 15 to protest a new payment policy they say will strain their cash flow.

channel_news.title: A timeline of what led up to Grüns being acquired by Unilever
channel_news.summary: Even compared to other startups in the red-hot supplement space, Grüns has had a meteoric rise, announcing on Thursday that it is being acquired by Unilever less than three years after its products hit the market. Here's a timeline of what led up to the acquisition.

channel_news.title: What Amazon CEO Andy Jassy’s annual letter to shareholders didn’t say
channel_news.summary: One major part of Amazon’s business was largely absent from its annual letter to shareholders: the millions of sellers who power its marketplace.
